monday.description: Pan-seared anchovy fillets mixed with sautéed cluster beans, served over long-grain rice and garnished with peppermint.

tuesday.description: Slow-cooked beef tri-tip wrapped in paratha bread with rehydrated velvet pioppini mushrooms, seasoned with black pepper.

wednesday.description: Braised lamb riblets tossed with cooked pappardelle, steamed cabbage, and infused with ground saffron.

thursday.description: Smoked mussels mixed with roasted radishes, served over whole grain Job's Tears and topped with a dollop of labneh.

friday.description: Grilled squid tubes served on toasted manakish base with sautéed bamboo shoots, drizzled with chili oil.

monday.description: Roasted pistachios mixed with cooked carnaroli rice, sliced cucumbers, and a drizzle of reduced-sodium veloute sauce.

tuesday.description: Grated parmesan cheese mixed with cooked ramen noodles, sautéed enoki mushrooms, and garnished with shiso leaves.

wednesday.description: Braised navy beans tossed with cooked chow mein noodles, steamed cabbage, and a drizzle of reduced-sodium romesco sauce.

thursday.description: Sliced pecorino romano cheese mixed with cooked couscous, roasted trumpet mushrooms, and seasoned with ground smoked paprika.

friday.description: Grated havarti cheese mixed with sautéed cloud ear mushrooms, served on toasted knackerbrot and drizzled with rapeseed oil.
